raw_text:
Unofficial Translation by the Insurance Regulator of Cambodia

- Never commit any misdemeanor or felony within the last 5 (five) years within or outside the Kingdom of Cambodia from the date of request for registration in individual insurance agent register.

**Article 7 ..**
An individual who intends to be an insurance agent in the Kingdom of Cambodia shall register in an individual insurance agent register via automation system of the **I.R.C.** from anywhere through the website: www.irc.gov.kh.

**Article 8 ..**
An individual shall fill in all required information and entered into all required conditions according the form mandated in the automation system.

**Article 9 ..**
Documents for the registration in individual insurance agent register that shall be entered in the automation system of **I.R.C.** in electronic form are as follows:
- Passport or identification card and photo 4x6 (taken within the last 6 months);
- Residence Record Book or Residence Certification Letter;
- At least high school diploma or temporary high school certificate;
- Certification of completion of insurance agent basic course;
- Declaration of the individual that he/she has no record of criminal conviction;
- Administrative fee payment receipt.

After verification and evaluation on all required documents above, **I.R.C.** has the right to approve or reject the registration request in individual insurance agent register within 3 (three) days from the date of receiving sufficient documents.

**Article 10 ..**
An individual shall ensure that all information applied for individual insurance agent registration and all required documents filled in and entered into the automation system of **I.R.C.** in electronic form are correct and not fraud. In case the registration officers of **I.R.C.** discover that those information and documents are incorrect and fraud, the individual shall be punished according to the applicable law.

**Article 11 ..**
Individual insurance agent registration card is valid for 1 (one) year from the issued date of the individual insurance agent registration card.

**Article 12 ..**
Individual insurance agent registration card shall not be the subject for transfer or sale.

**Article 13 ..**
An individual, who has obtained the registration approval in the individual insurance agent register from the **I.R.C.** can be an insurance agent for 1 (one) life insurance company, 1 (one) general insurance company, and 1 (one) micro-insurance company.
